moodLogs.note: shift ran long — flat all day

highlightLogs.text: Streaks aren't the point — showing up after a broken one is.
Book note: the city as an operating system you live inside.
Cheap dopamine is a loan. Sleep is the repayment plan.
You don't rise to your goals, you fall to your defaults.

journalLogs.text: Missed three stretch days after the double shift. Old me would have deleted the app. New me just… started again. That's the whole upgrade.
Grounding ritual is actually working. Ten minutes offline and the static drops.

gigs.text: Book dentist — it's been a year
